benefits.description: Overall youthful feeling, described as feeling like 25 again
Cognitive enhancement with Selank/Semax nasal combination
Enhanced recovery effects when combining Epithalon and Thymosin Alpha-1

side_effects.description: GHK-Cu injections formed lumps under skin that itched/hurt and took days to absorb, occurred regardless of injection site or dose
Headaches when dosing Selank/Semax too much in a row

protocol_notes: Combined multiple peptides into single syringe via backfill to reduce injection frequency. BPC dose later reduced from 1mg daily due to suspected inefficiency at higher doses. GHK-Cu initially attempted as injection but caused persistent lumps; also tried nasal spray (caused burning and mucus membrane drying) and tablets (ineffective); settled on topical application. Reports Epithalon/Thymosin Alpha-1 combination more effective than either alone. Selank and Semax used together nasally for 6+ months with monolaurin; cycles them to avoid headaches. Also uses psilocybin microdose daily in rotation. Year-long experimentation period documented in Medium articles.
